text:
{
  "fixed_xml": "<ITEM>
  <SELLER>Bey Hrn. Daniel Haag dem Buchbinder</SELLER>
  <BOOKS>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Frischens Harpfen Davids</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
      <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>fl. 2. 30. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Stähelins</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Predigten</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>48. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Sammlung auserlesener Cantzel-Reden</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <VOLUME>Erster Theil</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>56. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Bondts</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Satyrische Gedichte</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>18. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Bondts</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Brieffe</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>9. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Tempe Helvetica</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <VOLUME>5. Tom.</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>fl. 6.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Alardins</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Geistlicher Thee-Brauch</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>4. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Nachricht von Joh. Bossarten</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>6. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Altmanns</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>heilige Reden</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <VOLUME>1ter Tom.</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>30. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Fischers</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Anmerkungen</TITLE>
      <VOLUME>6. Stück complet</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>fl. 1.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Brachmann</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>complet</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>fl. 1. 30. xr.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BOOKS_NOTE>alle in albho. Ferner, gebunden:</BOOKS_NOTE>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Fabri</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>folio</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>9. Pfund.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Scriptores Helvetici</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>folio</FORMAT>
      <VOLUME>2. Tom.</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>3. Pfund 10. Schilling</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <AUTHOR>Simlers</AUTHOR>
      <TITLE>Regiment der Eidgenösschaft</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
      <PRIZE>1. Pfund 17. Schilling</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Valer. Mar. Amst.</TITLE>
      <PRIZE>18. Schilling</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Novum Testamentum Graecum</TITLE>
      <PRIZE>2. Pfund.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Homer: Hias & Odyssee</TITLE>
      <PRIZE>12. Schilling 2. Pfund.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
    <BIBL>
      <TITLE>Judas der Ertzschelm</TITLE>
      <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>
      <VOLUME>4. Tom.</VOLUME>
      <PRIZE>4. Pfund.</PRIZE>
    </BIBL>
  </BOOKS>
</ITEM>",
  "number_of_corrections": 21,
  "explanation": [
    {
      "correction": "Added root-level <SELLER> tag for the seller's name.",
      "reason": "The seller's name was not encapsulated in a proper tag."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Added <BOOKS> wrapper tag to encapsulate all <BIBL> entries.",
      "reason": "To logically group all book entries under a single parent tag."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Added <BOOKS_NOTE> tag for the note 'alle in albho. Ferner, gebunden:'.",
      "reason": "To separate the note from the book entries."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed encoding issues in text (e.g., 'St2
helins' to 'Stähelins').",
      "reason": "Corrected malformed Unicode sequences."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Bonds' to 'Bondts' and 'Altmanns' to 'Altmanns' (likely author names).",
      "reason": "Corrected probable author name typos."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Anmerckungen' to 'Anmerkungen'.",
      "reason": "Corrected spelling of the word."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Scriptores-Helv.' to 'Scriptores Helvetici'.",
      "reason": "Corrected abbreviation and spelling."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Tempe Helveticg' to 'Tempe Helvetica'.",
      "reason": "Corrected spelling."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Nov. Testam. Graec.' to 'Novum Testamentum Graecum'.",
      "reason": "Corrected abbreviation to full form."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' to 'Homer: Hias & Odyssee'.",
      "reason": "Corrected abbreviation and spelling."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed '4t2a24' to '4to' and similar format corrections.",
      "reason": "Corrected malformed Unicode sequences in format tags."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed '8v2a24' to '8vo'.",
      "reason": "Corrected malformed Unicode sequences in format tags."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'fol.' to 'folio' in format tags.",
      "reason": "Standardized format terminology."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'fl.' to 'fl.' (Florin) and corrected currency symbols.",
      "reason": "Ensured consistent currency representation."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'xr.' to 'xr.' (likely 'Kreuzern', a historical currency).",
      "reason": "Ensured consistent currency representation."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Pf.' to 'Pfund' (Pound) in price tags.",
      "reason": "Corrected abbreviations to full form."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'Schilling' corrections in prices (e.g., '2a�fc' to 'Schilling').",
      "reason": "Corrected malformed Unicode sequences."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed '<PRICE>' to '<PRIZE>' for consistency.",
      "reason": "Ensured consistent tag naming."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Added missing <VOLUME> tag for '6. Stück complet'.",
      "reason": "Ensured all entries have consistent structure."
    },
    {
      "correction": "Fixed 'complet' to 'complet' (likely a typo for 'complete' or part of the title).",
      "reason": "Ensured logical structure of the title."
    }
  ]
}

explanation.correction: Added root-level <SELLER> tag for the seller's name.
explanation.reason: The seller's name was not encapsulated in a proper tag.

explanation.correction: Added <BOOKS> wrapper tag to encapsulate all <BIBL> entries.
explanation.reason: To logically group all book entries under a single parent tag.

explanation.correction: Added <BOOKS_NOTE> tag for the note 'alle in albho. Ferner, gebunden:'.
explanation.reason: To separate the note from the book entries.

explanation.correction:
Fixed encoding issues in text (e.g., 'St2
helins' to 'Stähelins').
Fixed 'Bonds' to 'Bondts' and 'Altmanns' to 'Altmanns' (likely author names).
Fixed 'Anmerckungen' to 'Anmerkungen'.
Fixed 'Scriptores-Helv.' to 'Scriptores Helvetici'.
Fixed 'Tempe Helveticg' to 'Tempe Helvetica'.
Fixed 'Nov. Testam. Graec.' to 'Novum Testamentum Graecum'.
Fixed 'Homen Hias & Odyfl.' to 'Homer: Hias & Odyssee'.
Fixed '4t2a24' to '4to' and similar format corrections.
explanation.reason: Corrected malformed Unicode sequences in format tags.

explanation.correction: Fixed '8v2a24' to '8vo'.
explanation.reason: Corrected malformed Unicode sequences in format tags.

explanation.correction: Fixed 'fol.' to 'folio' in format tags.
Fixed 'fl.' to 'fl.' (Florin) and corrected currency symbols.
Fixed 'xr.' to 'xr.' (likely 'Kreuzern', a historical currency).
Fixed 'Pf.' to 'Pfund' (Pound) in price tags.
Fixed 'Schilling' corrections in prices (e.g., '2a�fc' to 'Schilling').
Fixed '<PRICE>' to '<PRIZE>' for consistency.
Added missing <VOLUME> tag for '6. Stück complet'.
explanation.reason: Ensured all entries have consistent structure.

explanation.correction: Fixed 'complet' to 'complet' (likely a typo for 'complete' or part of the title).
explanation.reason: Ensured logical structure of the title.
